name: Primitive Types & Type Inference

name: Interfaces & Type Contracts
description: Khai báo interface, type alias, union types, intersection types, type assertions.

name: Function Signatures & Tuple Types
description: Khai báo hàm, function overloads, optional parameters, tuples, enums.

name: Classes & Object-Oriented Abstraction
description: Lớp, access modifiers (public/private/protected), abstract classes, implements.

name: Generic Programming & Utility Types
description: Generics constraints, Partial, Readonly, Record, Pick, Omit, ReturnType.

name: Static Code Compiler & Build Options
description: Trình biên dịch static code, thuộc tính compilerOptions (strict, target, moduleResolution).

name: Module Resolution & Type Declarations
description: ES Modules, tệp khai báo kiểu .d.ts, gói @types/, module resolution.
